name: YNX Wallet

installEvidence.android: API 36 emulator-5576 install success; MainActivity cold launch 2140 ms / wait 2274 ms and second cold launch 477 ms / wait 513 ms; focused activity verified. Pixel 9 Pro Fold 2076x2152 cold launch 15082 ms / wait 15742 ms.
installEvidence.ios: GitHub Actions macOS 15 / Xcode 26.3 run 29646381701 built, booted an iPhone Simulator, installed the unsigned Release app, cold-launched com.ynxweb4.wallet, resolved ynxwallet://authorize, captured the fail-closed rejection UI and uploaded the app/evidence artifact.

knownLimitations: Central registry and Gateway lifecycle are candidates in this branch and are not merged or deployed.
No staging/public product deployment, production signing or store release exists; hosted binaries are engineering evidence only.
Native iOS development on this host requires full Xcode; the executed macOS CI provides the Simulator build/install evidence.
No external security audit or hardware-backed non-exportable chain transaction signer has been completed.
CycloneDX 1.6 review SBOM is reproducible and contains 431 runtime components, but four Expo override ELSPROBLEMS keep release-grade SBOM completeness false; package-lock.json remains authoritative.
